input.description: Research NotebookLM API and Claude integration options
input.prompt:
Research the following topics thoroughly and report back with detailed findings:

1. Does Google NotebookLM (https://notebooklm.google.com/) have an official public API?
2. Are there any MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for NotebookLM?
3. What integration methods exist for connecting external AI tools to NotebookLM?
4. Are there any GitHub projects, npm packages, or Python libraries that enable programmatic access to NotebookLM?
5. Can Claude.ai connect to NotebookLM via MCP servers?
6. What data formats does NotebookLM support for import (PDF, Google Docs, web URLs, etc.)?

Search for: "NotebookLM API", "NotebookLM MCP server", "NotebookLM integration Claude", "NotebookLM programmatic access"

Report all findings concisely including any GitHub repos, npm packages, or documentation URLs you find.

content.text:
## Research Findings: NotebookLM API & Integration

Based on my thorough research, here are the detailed findings for your questions:

### 1. **Official Public API**

Google NotebookLM **does not have an official public consumer API**. However, Google offers a **NotebookLM Enterprise API** exclusively for enterprise customers. This enterprise API supports:
- Notebook CRUD operations
- Source management
- Audio overview generation
- Notebook queries
- Enterprise features (VPC Service Controls, Customer-Managed Encryption Keys)

**Source:** [Google Cloud NotebookLM Enterprise Documentation](https://docs.cloud.google.com/gemini/enterprise/notebooklm-enterprise/docs/api-notebooks)

The NotebookLM team has stated "We are on it!" regarding public API development, though no official timeline has been announced.

---

### 2. **MCP (Model Context Protocol) Servers for NotebookLM**

**Yes, multiple MCP servers exist:**

- **[PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp](https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp)** - Production-ready MCP server with persistent auth, library management, cross-client sharing, zero hallucinations
- **[jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cli](https://github.com/jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cli)**
- **[julianoczkowski/notebooklm-mcp-2026](https://github.com/julianoczkowski/notebooklm-mcp-2026)** - Works with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
- **[LobeHub MCP Registry](https://lobehub.com/mcp/)** - Lists multiple NotebookLM MCP implementations
- **[MCPServers.org Directory](https://mcpservers.org/)** - Directory of available MCP servers

**Key Features:** These servers enable querying notebooks, adding sources, checking audio overviews, and automatic cross-references with citations.

---

### 3. **Integration Methods for External AI Tools**

**Primary Methods:**

1. **MCP (Model Context Protocol)** - Open-source standard allowing Claude and other AI agents to interact with NotebookLM through bridge servers
2. **Claude Skills** - Python-based implementation for Claude Code integration
3. **Browser Automation** - Claude Browser extension can interact with NotebookLM's web interface
4. **Direct API Access** - For enterprise customers via Google Cloud

**Sources:**
- [XDA: NotebookLM Connects to Claude Through MCP](https://www.xda-developers.com/notebooklm-connects-to-claude-through-mcp/)
- [Medium: NotebookLM + Claude via MCP (Feb 2026)](https://medium.com/@vinayanand2/notebooklm-claude-via-mcp-turning-two-ai-giants-into-one-research-machine-8219dab9df86)

---

### 4. **GitHub Projects, npm Packages, and Python Libraries**

**Python Libraries:**
- **[teng-lin/notebooklm-py](https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py)** - Unofficial Python API offering full programmatic access. Install: `pip install notebooklm-py`
- **[K-dash/nblm-rs](https://github.com/K-dash/nblm-rs)** - Rust-based NotebookLM Enterprise API client with Python SDK

**TypeScript/JavaScript:**
- **[photon-hq/notebooklm-kit](https://github.com/photon-hq/notebooklm-kit)** - TypeScript SDK for programmatic access with clean service-based interface

**Claude Integration:**
- **[PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill](https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill)** - Claude Code skill with browser automation, library management, persistent authentication

**Alternative/Complementary:**
- **[Goekdeniz-Guelmez/Local-NotebookLM](https://github.com/Goekdeniz-Guelmez/Local-NotebookLM)** - Local alternative to NotebookLM

---

### 5. **Can Claude.ai Connect to NotebookLM via MCP?**

**Yes, absolutely.** Claude Desktop can connect to NotebookLM through MCP servers. The setup process involves:
- Installing an MCP server implementation (like PleasePrompto's)
- Copy-paste terminal commands (takes ~10 minutes)
- Configuring the MCP server in Claude Desktop

**Benefits:**
- Claude autonomously queries entire NotebookLM research libraries
- Receives source-grounded, citation-backed answers from Gemini
- Runs multiple sequential searches to build deep understanding
- Accesses notebooks as if they were part of Claude's working memory

**Sources:**
- [Claude Lab: Complete MCP Integration Guide](https://claudelab.net/en/articles/claude-ai/claude-notebooklm-mcp-research-automation-pipeline)
- [Medium: NotebookLM + Claude Setup Guide](https://aimaker.substack.com/p/notebooklm-mcp-claude-setup-guide-research-workflow)

---

### 6. **Data Formats Supported by NotebookLM**

**Supported File Types:**
- **Documents:** PDF, DOCX, TXT, Markdown (MD)
- **Spreadsheets:** CSV, Google Sheets, XLSX
- **Presentations:** PowerPoint (PPTX), Google Slides
- **Web:** URLs (HTML pages, YouTube videos)
- **Audio Files:** MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, OPUS, AAC, AIFF, AMR, and others

**Limitations:**
- Max 500,000 words or 200MB per source
- Up to 50 sources per notebook
- Paywalled webpages not supported
- Web imports capture only text (not images, embedded videos, or nested pages)

**Source:** [Google NotebookLM Help: Add or discover new sources](https://support.google.com/notebooklm/answer/16215270)

---

## Summary

**No official public API exists**, but the community has filled the gap with multiple MCP servers, unofficial Python libraries, and TypeScript SDKs. Claude can now seamlessly connect to NotebookLM via MCP servers for integrated research workflows. The integration is becoming increasingly robust with multiple maintained implementations available.

content.text: Baik, sekarang saya akan menulis plan lengkap untuk setup MCP Server NotebookLM di Claude Desktop.

input.content:
# Plan: Connect Claude Desktop ke NotebookLM via MCP Server

## Context
Pengguna ingin menghubungkan **Claude Desktop App** ke **Google NotebookLM** menggunakan **MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server**.  
NotebookLM tidak memiliki public API resmi, namun komunitas telah membangun MCP server yang menggunakan browser automation / unofficial API untuk menjembatani keduanya.

Tujuan: Claude bisa query notebook, menambah sumber, dan berinteraksi dengan NotebookLM langsung dari chat di Claude Desktop.

---

## MCP Server yang Digunakan

**`julianoczkowski/notebooklm-mcp-2026`** — direkomendasikan karena:
- Kompatibel dengan Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code
- Aktif diperbarui (2026)
- Persistent authentication (tidak perlu login ulang tiap sesi)

Alternatif: `PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp` (juga stabil, fitur serupa)

---

## Prerequisites
- Node.js v18+ sudah terinstall (`node --version`)
- npx tersedia (otomatis dengan Node.js)
- Akun Google yang bisa akses NotebookLM
- Claude Desktop App sudah terinstall

---

## Langkah Implementasi

### Step 1 — Cek & Install Node.js
```bash
node --version   # Harus v18+
npx --version
```
Jika belum ada: download dari https://nodejs.org

### Step 2 — Install MCP Server NotebookLM
```bash
npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --version
# atau
npm install -g notebooklm-mcp-2026
```

### Step 3 — Temukan File Config Claude Desktop
Lokasi di Windows:
```
C:\Users\tyu\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json
```

### Step 4 — Edit `claude_desktop_config.json`
Tambahkan konfigurasi MCP server berikut:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "notebooklm": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "notebooklm-mcp-2026"],
      "env": {
        "GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL": "email-google-kamu@gmail.com"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

> Jika file sudah ada dengan config lain, tambahkan key `"notebooklm"` ke dalam objek `"mcpServers"` yang sudah ada.

### Step 5 — Autentikasi Google
Saat pertama kali dijalankan, MCP server akan membuka browser untuk login Google:
```bash
# Jalankan manual pertama kali untuk save token
npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --auth
```
Setelah login, token disimpan lokal sehingga tidak perlu login ulang.

### Step 6 — Restart Claude Desktop
Tutup dan buka ulang Claude Desktop agar config MCP terbaca.

### Step 7 — Verifikasi di Claude Desktop
Di chat Claude Desktop, ketik:
```
List semua notebook NotebookLM saya
```
Jika berhasil, Claude akan menampilkan daftar notebook dari akun Google kamu.

---

## Contoh Penggunaan Setelah Terhubung

```
"Tampilkan semua notebook saya"
"Query notebook [nama] tentang topik X"
"Tambahkan URL ini sebagai sumber ke notebook [nama]: https://..."
"Buat ringkasan dari notebook [nama]"
```

---

## File yang Akan Dibuat/Dimodifikasi
- `C:\Users\tyu\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json` — ditambah config MCP server

---

## Verifikasi & Testing
1. Restart Claude Desktop setelah edit config
2. Buka Settings → MCP Servers — pastikan `notebooklm` muncul dengan status connected
3. Chat: "List semua notebook saya" — harus mengembalikan data dari NotebookLM
4. Chat: "Query notebook X tentang Y" — harus mengembalikan jawaban berbasis sumber di notebook

---

## Troubleshooting Umum
| Masalah | Solusi |
|---|---|
| MCP server tidak muncul | Cek path config JSON sudah benar, restart Claude |
| Auth error | Jalankan `npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --auth` manual di terminal |
| Node not found | Install Node.js v18+ dari nodejs.org |
| JSON parse error | Validasi JSON di jsonlint.com sebelum disimpan |

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "notebooklm": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "notebooklm-mcp-2026"],
      "env": {
        "GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL": "email-google-kamu@gmail.com"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

> Jika file sudah ada dengan config lain, tambahkan key `"notebooklm"` ke dalam objek `"mcpServers"` yang sudah ada.

### Step 5 — Autentikasi Google
Saat pertama kali dijalankan, MCP server akan membuka browser untuk login Google:
```bash
# Jalankan manual pertama kali untuk save token
npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --auth
```
Setelah login, token disimpan lokal sehingga tidak perlu login ulang.

### Step 6 — Restart Claude Desktop
Tutup dan buka ulang Claude Desktop agar config MCP terbaca.

### Step 7 — Verifikasi di Claude Desktop
Di chat Claude Desktop, ketik:
```
List semua notebook NotebookLM saya
```
Jika berhasil, Claude akan menampilkan daftar notebook dari akun Google kamu.

---

## Contoh Penggunaan Setelah Terhubung

```
"Tampilkan semua notebook saya"
"Query notebook [nama] tentang topik X"
"Tambahkan URL ini sebagai sumber ke notebook [nama]: https://..."
"Buat ringkasan dari notebook [nama]"
```

---

## File yang Akan Dibuat/Dimodifikasi
- `C:\Users\tyu\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json` — ditambah config MCP server

---

## Verifikasi & Testing
1. Restart Claude Desktop setelah edit config
2. Buka Settings → MCP Servers — pastikan `notebooklm` muncul dengan status connected
3. Chat: "List semua notebook saya" — harus mengembalikan data dari NotebookLM
4. Chat: "Query notebook X tentang Y" — harus mengembalikan jawaban berbasis sumber di notebook

---

## Troubleshooting Umum
| Masalah | Solusi |
|---|---|
| MCP server tidak muncul | Cek path config JSON sudah benar, restart Claude |
| Auth error | Jalankan `npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --auth` manual di terminal |
| Node not found | Install Node.js v18+ dari nodejs.org |
| JSON parse error | Validasi JSON di jsonlint.com sebelum disimpan |

# Plan: Connect Claude Desktop ke NotebookLM via MCP Server

## Context
Pengguna ingin menghubungkan **Claude Desktop App** ke **Google NotebookLM** menggunakan **MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server**.  
NotebookLM tidak memiliki public API resmi, namun komunitas telah membangun MCP server yang menggunakan browser automation / unofficial API untuk menjembatani keduanya.

Tujuan: Claude bisa query notebook, menambah sumber, dan berinteraksi dengan NotebookLM langsung dari chat di Claude Desktop.

---

## MCP Server yang Digunakan

**`julianoczkowski/notebooklm-mcp-2026`** — direkomendasikan karena:
- Kompatibel dengan Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code
- Aktif diperbarui (2026)
- Persistent authentication (tidak perlu login ulang tiap sesi)

Alternatif: `PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp` (juga stabil, fitur serupa)

---

## Prerequisites
- Node.js v18+ sudah terinstall (`node --version`)
- npx tersedia (otomatis dengan Node.js)
- Akun Google yang bisa akses NotebookLM
- Claude Desktop App sudah terinstall

node --version   # Harus v18+
npx --version

npx notebooklm-mcp-2026 --version
# atau

```

```

  "mcpServers": {
    "notebooklm": {
      "command": "npx",

    }
  }
}

lines: \ No newline at end of file

content.text:
Config Claude Desktop sudah diupdate. Sekarang ada **satu langkah wajib** yang perlu kamu lakukan manual karena membutuhkan download: **install Node.js**.

---

## Langkah yang Sudah Selesai

**Config Claude Desktop** sudah diedit di [claude_desktop_config.json](C:\Users\tyu\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json):
```json
"mcpServers": {
  "notebooklm": {
    "command": "npx",
    "args": ["-y", "notebooklm-mcp-2026"],
    "env": {
      "GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL": "email-google-kamu@gmail.com"
    }
  }
}
```

---

## Langkah Manual yang Perlu Kamu Lakukan

### 1. Install Node.js (wajib)
Download dari: **https://nodejs.org** — pilih versi **LTS (v22+)**  
Centang opsi **"Add to PATH"** saat install.

### 2. Ganti Email di Config
Edit baris `GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL` di config tadi — ganti `email-google-kamu@gmail.com` dengan email Google yang kamu pakai di NotebookLM.

### 3. Jalankan Auth Google (pertama kali saja)
Buka **Command Prompt / PowerShell**, jalankan:
```cmd
npx -y notebooklm-mcp-2026 --auth
```
Browser akan terbuka → login ke akun Google kamu → izinkan akses.

### 4. Restart Claude Desktop
Tutup dan buka ulang Claude Desktop App.

### 5. Test Koneksi
Di chat Claude Desktop, ketik:
```
Tampilkan semua notebook NotebookLM saya
```

---

## Cara Pakai Setelah Terhubung

| Perintah di Claude | Hasil |
|---|---|
| `"List semua notebook saya"` | Menampilkan daftar notebook |
| `"Query notebook X tentang Y"` | Jawaban berdasarkan sumber di notebook |
| `"Tambahkan URL ini ke notebook X"` | Menambah sumber baru |
| `"Ringkas notebook X"` | Membuat ringkasan |

---

> **Troubleshoot:** Jika MCP tidak terhubung setelah restart, buka Settings > Developer di Claude Desktop untuk cek status server.
